# Beudox HR Management System - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

This is a modern React-based HR management system built with TypeScript, using Supabase as the backend. The application follows a component-based architecture with clear separation of concerns.

## Technology Stack

- **Frontend Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript
- **Build Tool**: Vite
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with ShadCN/UI components
- **Routing**: React Router v6
- **State Management**: React Query for server state, React hooks for local state
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Real-time)
- **UI Components**: Radix UI primitives with custom styling
- **Forms**: React Hook Form with Zod validation
- **Charts**: Recharts
- **Rich Text**: Tiptap editor

## Application Structure

### Routing & Navigation
- BrowserRouter with protected routes
- Role-based access control using `canAccess()` function
- Route protection with authentication checks
- Automatic redirects based on auth state

### Component Organization
- `src/components/ui/` - Reusable UI primitives (buttons, inputs, dialogs, etc.)
- `src/components/layout/` - Layout components (AppLayout, sidebar, topbar)
- Feature-specific components organized by domain (employee-profile, leave, payroll, etc.)
- Page components in `src/pages/` corresponding to routes

### Key Architectural Patterns

#### Authentication Flow
- Supabase auth with session management
- Password mode detection for invite/recovery flows
- Protected routes with role checking
- Loading states to prevent content flashing

#### Data Fetching
- React Query for all API calls
- Query keys organized by feature and parameters
- Optimistic updates and caching strategies
- Error handling with user-friendly messages

#### Component Patterns
- Functional components with hooks
- Custom hooks for business logic (`useAuth`, `useSort`, etc.)
- Props interfaces for type safety
- Consistent styling with Tailwind classes

## Key Files & Their Purposes

### Core Application Files
- `src/main.tsx` - Application entry point, renders App component
- `src/App.tsx` - Main app component with routing and providers
- `src/index.css` - Global styles and Tailwind imports

### Authentication & Authorization
- `src/hooks/useAuth.tsx` - Authentication state management
- `src/lib/role-access.ts` - Role-based access control utilities
- `src/pages/Login.tsx` - Login page
- `src/pages/SetPassword.tsx` - Password setup for invites/recovery

### Layout & Navigation
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx` - Main layout wrapper
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx` - Navigation sidebar
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx` - Header with user menu
- `src/components/NavLink.tsx` - Styled navigation link component

### Employee Management
- `src/pages/Employees.tsx` - Employee listing page
- `src/pages/EmployeeProfile.tsx` - Individual employee profile
- `src/pages/EmployeeForm.tsx` - Add/edit employee form
- `src/components/employee-profile/AttendanceTab.tsx` - Attendance records display
- `src/components/SearchableEmployeeSelect.tsx` - Employee selection component

### Business Logic Libraries
- `src/lib/utils.ts` - General utility functions (cn for class merging)
- `src/lib/format-date.ts` - Date formatting utilities
- `src/lib/leave-utils.ts` - Leave calculation functions
- `src/lib/role-access.ts` - Access control functions
- `src/lib/notifications.ts` - Notification sending utilities
- `src/lib/client-activity.ts` - Activity logging constants

### Database Integration
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts` - Supabase client configuration
- `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts` - Database type definitions
- Supabase functions in `supabase/functions/` for server-side logic

## Database Schema Insights

Based on the SQL migrations, the system manages:
- Employee information and organizational structure
- Attendance records with check-in/out times
- Leave requests and balances
- Payroll calculations and salary history
- Project management and team assignments
- Performance evaluations and reviews
- HR policies and job descriptions
- Client and invoice management

## Component Patterns

### Form Components
- React Hook Form for form state management
- Zod schemas for validation
- ShadCN form components for consistent UI

### Data Display
- Tables with sorting and filtering
- Cards for summary information
- Charts for analytics (using Recharts)

### Modal/Dialog Patterns
- AlertDialog for confirmations
- Dialog for forms and detailed views
- Drawer for mobile-responsive interfaces

## State Management

### Local State
- useState for component-specific state
- useReducer for complex state transitions (toast notifications)

### Server State
- React Query for API data fetching
- Query invalidation for cache updates
- Optimistic updates for better UX

### Global State
- Auth context for user session
- Theme context (next-themes)

## Styling Approach

- Tailwind CSS for utility-first styling
- CSS custom properties for design tokens
- Consistent spacing and color schemes
- Responsive design with mobile-first approach
- Custom font families (--ff-display, --ff-body)

## Development Workflow

- Vite for fast development and building
- ESLint for code quality
- Vitest for unit testing
- Playwright for E2E testing
- TypeScript for type safety

## Performance Considerations

- Code splitting with dynamic imports
- React Query caching to reduce API calls
- Optimized bundle with Vite
- Lazy loading for routes and components
- Efficient re-renders with proper key props

## Security

- Supabase RLS (Row Level Security) policies
- Role-based access control
- Secure authentication flows
- Input validation with Zod
- XSS protection through React's built-in escaping
